description:
Manage and configure RØDE devices.


[Bug Fix] Fixed an issue where the UNSUPPORTED DEVICES dialogue was not displayed on some startups.
[Improvement] Added the ability to use CMD+Q shortcut to close the entire application.
[Improvement] Added a UI item to show storage time remaining on RØDE Wireless devices that support recording.
[Improvement] Improved the firmware updating behaviour to allow update of RØDE devices with low battery levels.
[Bug Fix] Fixed an issue that was preventing timecode metadata from being exported under certain conditions.
[Bug Fix] Fixed an issue where exporting audio recordings would fail when the destination directory contained emoji and other special characters.
[Improvement] Restored support for macOS 11.0 Big Sur
